document_metadata.source_document: Tamil Nadu Transport Department Notification G.O.

special_notices.omr_it_corridor: High-enforcement IT corridor. Strict lane discipline and speed cams at every major signal.
special_notices.ecr_scenic_highway: Strict speed enforcement. Avoid weekend speeding. Breathalyzer check-points frequent.
special_notices.chennai_orr: Heavy vehicle traffic. Speed limit: 80kmph/100kmph. CCTV surveillance for overspeeding active.
special_notices.gst_road: Primary highway to Southern TN. Strict enforcement for illegal parking near toll plazas and speeding.
special_notices.chennai_bengaluru_nh48: Frequent speed traps near Vellore and Krishnagiri stretches.

violations.plain_english_summary: Compounding for no helmet in Tamil Nadu. High-enforcement in Chennai and Coimbatore urban zones.
extraction_notes: Tamil Nadu authorities strictly enforce the ₹1000 fine and automatic license suspension recommendation to the RTO.

violations.plain_english_summary: Compounding for high-speed maneuvers on Chennai Outer Ring Road (ORR) and GST road. Focusses on lane discipline and dangerous speed.
extraction_notes: Intensive night patrolling on ORR and GST Road for commercial vehicle safety.

violations.plain_english_summary: Compounding for speeding on Chennai's high-speed corridors. Automatically captured by radar cams.
extraction_notes: Strict radar enforcement on OMR, GST Road, and ECR. Fines are usually processed digitally via speed cameras.

violations.plain_english_summary: Zero tolerance for drunk driving in Tamil Nadu. Breathalyzer tests are mandatory on highway toll gates and city exits.
extraction_notes: Court appearance mandatory. Severe enforcement on weekends near ECR and GST Road.
